command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i ~/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.205 bash -s << 'ENDSSH'
cd /home/jose/moreno-ai

# Patch bridge to use wave1 executor actions
grep -n 'build_executor_actions' runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py | head -10

python3 << PYPATCH
content = open('runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py').read()

# Replace build_executor_actions import/call with wave1 version
old1 = 'from runtime.moreno_governed_executor import build_executor_actions'
new1 = 'from runtime.moreno_governed_executor import build_executor_actions, build_executor_actions_wave1'

old2 = 'EXECUTOR_ACTIONS = build_executor_actions(DEFAULT_REPO)'
new2 = 'EXECUTOR_ACTIONS = build_executor_actions_wave1(DEFAULT_REPO)'

# Also handle inline build call patterns
changed = False
if old1 in content:
    content = content.replace(old1, new1)
    changed = True
    print('Patched import')
if old2 in content:
    content = content.replace(old2, new2)
    changed = True
    print('Patched EXECUTOR_ACTIONS')

if not changed:
    # Try alternative patterns
    import re
    # Find where executor actions are built
    patterns = [
        (r'(build_executor_actions\()', 'build_executor_actions_wave1('),
    ]
    for pat, repl in patterns:
        new_content = re.sub(pat, repl, content, count=1)
        if new_content != content:
            content = new_content
            changed = True
            print(f"Patched via regex: {pat}")
            break
    if not changed:
        print('WARNING: could not find build_executor_actions call to patch')
        # Show context
        for i, line in enumerate(content.split(chr(10))):
            if 'executor_action' in line.lower() or 'build_executor' in line.lower():
                print(f'Line {i+1}: {line}')

open('runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py', 'w').write(content)
PYPATCH

python3 -c "import ast; ast.parse(open('runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py').read()); print('BRIDGE SYNTAX OK')"
echo "=BRIDGE_EXECUTOR_LINES="
grep -n 'build_executor\|EXECUTOR_ACTIONS\|wave1' runtime/moreno_operator_bridge.py | head -10
ENDSSH
